name: legal secretaries in law firms managing 10-20 client appointments per week tool
description: For legal secretaries in law firms processing 10-20 client appointments per week, missed appointments cause client dissatisfaction. We automate appointment reminders instead of manual scheduling and reminders via email or phone.
target_audience: legal secretaries in law firms managing 10-20 client appointments per week
